summary: Fix type safety issues in orchestration route (Set.size vs number misuse for traces/parentSpans, incorrect object-vs-number pass to evaluatePolicyEngine), rename ambiguous model IDs in opencode.json, add missing opencode-safe-io workspace dependencies, and allow 401 on /api/config in api-sanity script.

validation.scripts: bunx tsc --noEmit (packages/opencode-dashboard) - no errors in production source

notes: Orchestration route had three type bugs: traces and parentSpans were Sets but code called them as numbers (.size omitted), and evaluatePolicyEngine received a full object instead of a numeric score. Model IDs llama-3.1-70b renamed to provider-prefixed names to avoid collision between Groq and Cerebras. opencode-safe-io dep was used but undeclared in two packages.
